title: Context Menu Items Click Event
description: Represents the event when a context-menu item is clicked. Extends NXClickEvent and carries the clicked item's payload and a cancel flag.

props.name: sender
props.description: The context menu component that emitted the event.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The original native mouse event (inherited from NXClickEvent).

props.name: item

type.name: { name?: string; text: string; data?: any; }

props.description: Information about the clicked item (name, text, optional data).

props.name: canceled
props.description: Set to true to cancel the default action for the clicked item.
